2. Click on '...'
3. See error

```
Paste console errors here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17.4 |
| OS | e.g. macOS 14.4, iOS 17.4, Windows 11 |
| Device | e.g. iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S24, Desktop |
| App version / Commit | e.g. v1.0.2 or commit SHA |
| PWA (installed)? | Yes / No |
| Network condition | Online / Offline / Throttled |

## Story Mode (if relevant)

- [ ] Classic
- [ ] Mad Libs
- [ ] Sleep

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context about the problem here. -->

## Checklist (for the reporter)

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have NOT included any personal information (names, email addresses, etc.)
- [ ] I have NOT included any API keys or secrets in this report
- [ ] This is NOT a security vulnerability (I would report that privately per SECURITY.md)
